# Euro Detailing

> Premium mobile car detailing in Newton, MA and surrounding areas. Run by Eric Salas.

Euro Detailing is a mobile car detailing business based in Newton, Massachusetts. The business comes directly to the client's location — driveway, office lot, or apartment complex — and provides professional interior, exterior, and bundle detailing services. No fixed shop, no drop-offs.

## Services

- [Interior Detailing](https://eurodetailing.com/services/interior.html): Professional interior cleaning including vacuuming, steam cleaning, leather conditioning, and surface detailing. Starting at $90 basic, $160 premium.
- [Exterior Detailing](https://eurodetailing.com/services/exterior.html): Full exterior wash, clay bar treatment, and protective finish. Starting at $60 basic, $120 premium.
- [Interior + Exterior Bundle](https://eurodetailing.com/services/bundle.html): Complete interior and exterior detail. Starting at $135 basic, $270 premium.

## Add-on Services

- Plastic Mat Restoration: $25+
- Engine Bay Detailing: $49.99
- Seat Extraction: $49.99+
- Pet Hair Removal: $35+

## Service Area

Primary: Newton, MA 02465
Also serving: Brookline, Watertown, Wellesley, Needham, Belmont, Brighton, Allston, Boston

## Contact

- Owner: Eric Salas
- Phone: +1 781-290-3040
- Email: eurodetailinginfo@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/euro_detailingg
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@eurodetailing

## Booking

Book directly through Cal.com links on each individual service page. Maintenance detailing options are available alongside premium tier bookings.

## Business Details

- Mobile service only — no fixed location
- Payment accepted: Cash, Venmo, Zelle, Cash App, Check
- Payment collected after service completion
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8:00am–8:00pm
